allow: Bash(git --no-pager diff -- main.py config/settings.py src/analysis/claude_analyst.py src/analysis/sentiment.py)

PowerShell(try { $pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8050 -State Listen -ErrorAction Stop\).OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; $pids | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; "stopped dashboard PID $_" } } catch { "no listener on 8050 \(already stopped\)" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8050 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Stopping PID $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } } else { Write-Output "No listener on 8050" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8050 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Stopping PID $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } } else { Write-Output "No listener on 8050" })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8050 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Stopping old instance PID $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force } } else { Write-Output "No listener on 8050" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 15;$i++\){ $c=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8050 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){ $ok=$true; break }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 }; if\($ok\){ "LISTENING on 8050 \(PID $\($c.OwningProcess\)\)" } else { "NOT yet listening after wait" })

PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from config.settings import settings; k=settings.fred_api_key; print\('fred enabled:', settings.enable_fred\); print\('key set:', bool\(k\)\); print\('key len:', len\(k\) if k else 0\)")

PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "from config.settings import settings; from src.data.fred import fetch_macro_context; ctx = fetch_macro_context\(settings.fred_api_key\); print\('RESULT:', 'None' if ctx is None else 'MacroContext OK'\); print\('regime:', getattr\(ctx,'regime',None\)\)")
